response.justification: The candidate is a versatile senior full-stack engineer with strong testing culture and some high-throughput systems exposure, but he does not meet the core minimum qualifications for this role. The position requires 8 years of C++ experience, while his C++ work is limited to a short stint at National Instruments and a thesis project; his systems work is primarily in DLang and Node.js. He also lacks formal technical-leadership experience managing cross-team priorities, and his background is product/web engineering rather than cloud compute platform or large-scale infrastructure ownership.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput microservices experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec) at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus mentoring via workshops and courses
Broad polyglot experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded, including open-source project ownership
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8 years of C++ experience (roughly under a year of professional C++)
No formal technical-lead role leading strategy, priorities, and deliverables across teams
Limited large-scale cloud/compute infrastructure ownership; experience skews toward product and web development
